step_rationale: Cardioprotective signaling pathway; reduced in myocardial stunning.
mechanism: PPAR-mediated cardioprotective peroxisome-proliferator signaling is attenuated in post-MI myocardial stunning and heart-failure progression.

trials.title: Targeting Peroxisome Proliferator-activated Receptor-gamma in Peritoneal Dialysis Patients - Will it Reduce Inflammation, Atherosclerosis, Calcification and Improve Survival of Peritoneal Dialysis Patients?
